fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

telepractice_text: North Carolina permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: North Carolina issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: North Carolina is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
